creator: contact@evilham.com
text:
Discovered this on #252415 but thought it'd be better off on a PR of its own.

It looks like support for vpopmail is being dropped in dovecot [1]

I have not been able to identify its deprecation in the documentation [2] or changelogs, but as seen in #252415 some files related to vpopmail have started already.

[1]: https://wiki.dovecot.org/AuthDatabase/VPopMail
[2]: https://doc.dovecot.org/configuration_manual/authentication/password_databases_passdb/?highlight=vpop
